SLA BREACH: 4.5-hour service disruption on Dec 15 affecting API monitoring for all Meridian services. Per contract Section 7.2 (99.9% monthly uptime SLA), customer is entitled to a 5% service credit on the next monthly invoice. Credit amount: €929.18 (5% of gross monthly). AM Elena Rodriguez notified. Credit to be applied to January 2026 invoice.
notes: SLA breach logged. Elena Rodriguez aware. Credit pending application to INV-2026-MH-026.

Auto-matched.
SLA credit note — Dec 15 service disruption. 5% of monthly subscription per contract Section 7.2. Net: €767.92, Tax: €161.26, Total: €929.18. To be applied to January 2026 invoice (INV-2026-MH-026).
notes: Credit note generated. PENDING application to January invoice. AM Elena Rodriguez to confirm application during invoice review.

description: AM transition: Elena Rodriguez transitioning Meridian Health account to Tomás Herrera effective today (Dec 19).
